table.style: width:100%; max-width:780px; margin:0 auto; border-collapse:collapse; border-radius:10px; overflow:hidden; box-shadow:0 4px 32px rgba(220,20,60,0.35);

td.style: background:#DC143C; height:4px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0;
background:#0a0a0a; padding:0; border-bottom:3px solid #DC143C;
width:80px; vertical-align:middle; padding:14px 20px;

img.style: height:60px; display:block; filter:brightness(0) invert(1) sepia(0.8) saturate(600%) hue-rotate(320deg) brightness(1.1);

td.style: text-align:center; vertical-align:middle; padding:14px 0;

div.style: color:#999999; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:0.6rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase; margin-bottom:2px;
color:#ffffff; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.1rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:2px; text-transform:uppercase;

td.style: width:80px; text-align:right; vertical-align:middle; padding:14px 20px;

img.style: height:72px; width:72px; object-fit:contain; display:block; margin-left:auto; border-radius:6px; padding:3px;

td.t-att-style: 'width:260px; min-width:260px; vertical-align:top; padding:0; background:#181818; border-left:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#DC143C') + ';'

img.t-att-style: 'width:255px; height:340px; object-fit:cover; object-position:top center; display:block; border-top:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#DC143C') + '; border-bottom:5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color if doc.tier_id else '#DC143C') + ';'

td.style: vertical-align:top; padding:22px 24px; background:#1e1e1e; position:relative;

div.style: position:absolute; top:12px; right:14px; width:64px; height:64px; border-radius:50%; background:#DC143C; transform:rotate(-10deg); box-shadow:0 0 0 3px #8B0000, 0 6px 20px rgba(220,20,60,0.5); text-align:center; line-height:64px;

span.style: color:#ffffff; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:-1px; vertical-align:middle;

div.style: font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:1.7rem; font-weight:700; color:#f5f5f5; line-height:1.1; margin-bottom:2px; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase;
font-size:0.9rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:3px; text-transform:uppercase; color:#DC143C; margin-bottom:10px;

span.t-att-style: 'background:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#DC143C') + '30; color:' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#DC143C') + '; border:1.5px solid ' + (doc.tier_id.color or '#DC143C') + '80; padding:4px 16px; border-radius:20px; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1.5px; text-transform:uppercase;'

td.style: height:2px; padding:0; background:#DC143C;

color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#f5f5f5; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;

color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#f5f5f5; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;

color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#FF1744; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:700; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;

color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#f5f5f5; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;

color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#f5f5f5; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; border-bottom:1px solid #2e2e2e; vertical-align:middle;
color:#DC143C; font-size:0.78rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:1px; text-transform:uppercase; padding:7px 10px 7px 0; white-space:nowrap; width:44%; vertical-align:middle;
color:#f5f5f5; font-size:0.82rem; font-weight:600; padding:7px 0; vertical-align:middle;
background:#0a0a0a; padding:8px 20px; text-align:center; border-top:3px solid #DC143C;

span.style: color:#999999; font-family:'Teko',sans-serif; font-size:0.65rem; font-weight:700; letter-spacing:4px; text-transform:uppercase;

td.style: background:#DC143C; height:4px; padding:0; line-height:0; font-size:0;
